---
output:
  word_document: default
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(flextable)
library(officer)

set_flextable_defaults(font.size = 9,
                       font.family = 'Rowan',
                       line_spacing = .8
)

# Read the CSV file
fraction <- read_csv("fraction.csv")

# Print column names and first few rows for debugging
print(colnames(fraction))
print(head(fraction))

# Check if 'year' column exists
if("year" %in% colnames(fraction)) {
  fraction <- fraction %>% 
    mutate(year = as.character(year)) %>%
    group_by(depth) %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = year)
} else {
  # If 'year' doesn't exist, we'll assume the data is already in wide format
  fraction <- fraction %>% 
    group_by(depth)
}
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
fraction %>%
  as_grouped_data('depth') %>% 
  flextable() %>%
  set_header_labels(
    depth = 'Depth',
    particle = 'Particle Size',
    usga = 'USGA Spec',
    trend = 'Trend'
  ) %>%
  add_header_row(
    values = c("",'%Retained'),
    colwidths = c(3, ncol(fraction) - 3)  # Adjust colwidths based on actual number of columns
  ) %>% 
  add_header_lines(
    values = c(
      'OM 246 Sand Fractions'
    )
  ) %>% 
  autofit()
  
```
